title: Seeing Onion in a Dream: Meaning and Interpretation
seoDescription: Seeing an onion in a dream symbolizes multi-layered issues, purification through tears, and discovering the essence.
introduction: With its layered structure, the Onion symbolizes the multi-dimensional nature of the human soul and problems. Seeing an onion in a dream represents the courage to dive beneath the surface; it narrates the journey to reach the truth (the essence) at the cost of shedding tears.
symbolism: Peeling an onion is about lifting defense mechanisms or the veils of a problem. The eye irritation (crying) experienced in this process is the release of suppressed emotions and a cathartic purification. The onion is also a symbol of resilience and rootedness.
cosmicAnalysis:
This dream carries 4 different cosmic messages according to the phases of the Moon:

**🌑 New Moon:** This phase symbolizes inner exploration and rebirth. The onion, representing the courage to delve into the depths of the soul, indicates that it is time for the dreamer to make a new beginning and a desire to explore emotional layers.

**🌓 Waxing Moon:** In this phase, peeling an onion symbolizes emotional growth and the process of liberation. The dreamer finds the courage to release suppressed emotions and feels it is time to take action to resolve their issues.

**🌕 Full Moon:** The Full Moon is a time of enlightenment and completion. The onion in the dream, along with tears, represents the emergence of inner truths and the experience of catharsis; this signifies a period in which the dreamer experiences enlightenment in their spiritual depths.

**🌗 Waning Moon:** This phase is about the process of letting go and freeing oneself. The onion indicates that defense mechanisms need to be lifted and inner burdens lightened; the dreamer realizes it is time to break free from the weights of the past and renew their spirit.
commonScenarios: Chopping onions: Represents a conscious analysis and problem-solving process; the effort to manage an emotional burden by breaking it down.
Eating onions: Symbolizes accepting and digesting a difficult truth; taking the bitter medicine to heal.
Sprouted onion: Indicates that an old issue or emotion is being revived, but this time carries the potential for growth.
cta: What layers are you ready to peel? Explore the depths of your dreams with Dream Boat.
